topics.title: Ingestion and alignment tooling
topics.description: Tracks sequencing intake, reference handling, and local alignment changes that could affect the live desktop slice.

pubmed: tumor normal sequencing alignment workflow cancer

openQuestions: Are there low-friction improvements to local file normalization or reference management that reduce user failure modes?
Do upstream alignment or QC best practices suggest clearer uncertainty messaging in the live stage?

topics.title: Somatic variant calling
topics.description: Focuses on tumor-normal variant calling methods, Mutect2 drift, and evidence that changes the default calling strategy.

pubmed: somatic variant calling tumor normal neoantigen cancer

openQuestions: Should canine and feline workspaces use the same small-variant assumptions as human workspaces?
What evidence is strong enough to justify changing the default Mutect2-oriented path?

topics.title: Variant annotation
topics.description: Tracks annotation sources, transcript effects, and Ensembl VEP release movement that can change downstream neoantigen inputs.
openQuestions: Which annotation changes would materially shift neoantigen ranking or construct content?
How should cross-species annotation uncertainty be surfaced when canine or feline evidence is sparse?

topics.title: Neoantigen prediction
topics.description: Tracks peptide-MHC prediction, pVACtools, NetMHCpan, and benchmark data that affect how cancerstudio scores neoantigen candidates.
openQuestions: When does new binding or immunogenicity evidence justify reweighting candidate selection?
How should human-focused benchmarks translate into canine and feline risk messaging?

topics.title: Epitope selection
topics.description: Tracks ranking heuristics, class I versus class II prioritization, and evidence that changes the multi-epitope cassette strategy.
openQuestions: Should class II evidence receive more weight than current defaults imply?
What benchmark data best predicts useful cassette diversity without overfitting to one assay?

topics.title: mRNA construct design
topics.description: Tracks construct architecture, linker design, codon optimization, and stability evidence that can shape the output construct.

pubmed: mRNA construct design personalized cancer vaccine

openQuestions: Which construct-design choices appear robust enough to become defaults versus expert overrides?
What evidence changes how we balance expression, structure, and manufacturability?

topics.title: Comparative canine oncology
topics.description: Tracks dog-specific datasets, veterinary oncology evidence, and translational findings that affect canine workflow confidence.
openQuestions: Where is the strongest canine-specific evidence gap that should shape UI uncertainty and defaults?
Which comparative datasets are mature enough to use as benchmarks or reference priors?

topics.title: MHC and DLA resources
topics.description: Tracks DLA alleles, binding evidence, immunopeptidomics, and IPD-MHC drift that may reduce the largest canine uncertainty in the pipeline.
openQuestions: Which DLA alleles have enough evidence to move from speculative support toward explicit modeling?
How should new DLA resources change species-specific confidence scoring?

topics.title: Structure prediction and AI review
topics.description: Tracks later-stage structure and AI-assisted review evidence without presenting those later stages as production-ready.
openQuestions: What evidence would justify moving structure or AI review closer to the main pipeline?
How should research-only findings be surfaced without overstating readiness?

topics.title: Regulatory and clinical signal
topics.description: Tracks clinical trial movement and translational signal that informs what the product should emphasize or clearly label as uncertain.
openQuestions: Which trial design or translational trends should shape backlog priorities next?
Where do human and veterinary expectations diverge enough that the product should say so explicitly?
